name: Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, cocoa, and sugar.
2. Add the egg yolks to the mixture.
3. Gradually add milk until the dry ingredients and eggs are well combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla and butter.
5. Cook over medium heat until thick, stirring constantly.
6. Pour into a baked pie shell.
7. Top with meringue and brown.
8. Makes 2 - 8 inch pies from filling.
